postmark.Subject: Re: Refinance — Marcus Webb (high LTV)
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Collateral update: Marcus Webb can pledge a second property as additional security — 2447 Whyte Avenue NW, Edmonton, AB, currently appraised at $385,000 with no existing mortgage. This brings effective combined LTV well below 70%. Title can be encumbered on closing.

Happy to provide title docs for the second property.

Jonathan Ferrara
